prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2024年理科最低位次约53→97→41→45名，2022年因招生专业扩容位次大幅后移至97名，2023–2024年回升至41–45名区间，近两年趋于稳定；2025年录取数据 缺失，；2021–2024年理科计划数分别为6、6、7、5人，2026年物理类计划增至7人，较2024年扩招40%；扩招幅度较大，预计竞争略有加剧， 位次数字有所后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学为985、211、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续六年稳居第3名，属全国顶尖高校层次，对青海省高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及学术不端与校园安全事件，但整体关注度有限；抖音热度排名第14（高热），综合热度约377万，短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度维 持高位；历史投档异常信号仅2021年（低关注）和2023年（中关注），未见明显断档记录；浙江大学拥有计算机科学与技术A+、软件工程A+、控制科学与工程A+ 、光学工程A+、临床医学A等39个A-及以上学科，学科实力全国顶尖，与招生专业（工科试验班各方向）高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程 等浙大核心工科专业在2024–2026年均为高热推荐或推荐状态；本省2026年考生总数约48000人（较2025年增长约0.7%），物理类估算约30672人，考生规模微增，较2024年理科本科一段343分略有上升，整体稳定；浙江大学位于浙江省杭州市，属东部沿海发达地区，对青海省考生有较强的跨省吸引力；该校在青海省招生人数极少（个位数），地域偏好对位次影响有限。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum science ranking was approximately 53 → 97 → 41 → 45. In 2022, due to the expansion of enrollment majors, the ranking significantly shifted back to 97. From 2023 to 2024, it recovered to the 41–45 range, stabilizing in recent years. 2025 admission data is missing. From 2021 to 2024, the science enrollment plan numbers were 6, 6, 7, and 5 respectively. In 2026, the Physics Category plan increases to 7, a 40% expansion compared to 2024. The expansion is relatively large, so competition is expected to intensify slightly, with the ranking number shifting backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class construction university. It has ranked 3rd in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings for six consecutive years, placing it among the top universities nationwide, which strongly attracts high-scoring students from Qinghai Province. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct and campus safety incidents, but overall attention is limited. Douyin popularity ranks 14th (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of approximately 3.77 million. Short video platform exposure is high, maintaining a high level of application attention. Historical admission anomaly signals only appeared in 2021 (low attention) and 2023 (medium attention), with no obvious gaps in records. Zhejiang University has 39 A- or higher disciplines, including Computer Science and Technology A+, Software Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Optical Engineering A+, and Clinical Medicine A, making its academic strength top-tier nationally and highly matching its enrollment majors (various directions of Engineering Experimental Class).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors at Zhejiang University, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering, are all highly recommended or recommended for 2024–2026. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is approximately 48,000 (an increase of about 0.7% compared to 2025), with an estimated 30,672 in the Physics Category. The examinee scale has slightly increased, with a slight rise from the 2024 science undergraduate first segment score of 343, remaining generally stable. Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou City, Zhejiang Province, an economically developed eastern coastal region, which has a strong cross-provincial appeal to Qinghai Province examinees. The university enrolls very few students in Qinghai Province (single digits), so regional preference has a limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2024 baseline ranking of 45, the 2026 Physics Category expansion of 40% (from 5 to 7) leading to intensified competition, a slight increase in the province's examinee total, and Zhejiang University's top-tier level continuing to attract high-scoring students, the estimated 2026 minimum ranking is approximately 59, with a range of 52–66.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (≤52), you can focus on sprinting for the Chu Kochen Honors College Mixed Class.
